explanations.6: The left number (8080) is the port on your computer; the right number (80) is the port inside the container—traffic to localhost:8080 gets forwarded to the container's port 80.
explanations.8: This tells the Joomla container where to find its database by hostname; 'joomladb' matches the service name below, so Docker's network will resolve it automatically.
explanations.13: This mounts your local php.ini file into the container at a specific path, so the container uses your custom PHP settings instead of its defaults.
